summary: Login latency spike caused timeouts for a subset of users.
root_cause: Redis eviction triggered cache stampede on token validation.
user_impact: ~18% of login attempts exceeded 2s; retries increased load.
followup_actions: Add jittered TTLs to token cache
Introduce p95 login latency SLO alert

summary: Wide 502 errors due to load balancer target misconfiguration.
root_cause: Incorrect health check path during rollout; targets marked unhealthy.

summary: Authorize charge failures after Stripe rate limiting event.
root_cause: Unbounded concurrent retries caused cascading 429 responses.
user_impact: Checkout conversions down ~35%; orders stuck in pending state.
followup_actions: Add circuit breaker on Stripe integration

summary: ETL job failed leading to stale dashboards.
root_cause: Uncaught exception in transformation step; retry policy misconfigured.
user_impact: Executive dashboards showed previous day's data.
followup_actions: On-call runbook for ETL failure triage

summary: Order confirmation emails delayed due to Kafka under-replication.
root_cause: ISR fell below threshold during broker maintenance; producers throttled.
user_impact: Order confirmation emails delivered 30–60 minutes late.
followup_actions: Define freshness SLO and lag thresholds

summary: Search latency and correctness degraded under peak load.
root_cause: Hot shards and slow queries in Elasticsearch due to imbalanced indexing.
user_impact: Search p95 exceeded 2s; occasional empty results for valid queries.
followup_actions: Add query caching and circuit breaker

summary: Password reset emails bouncing due to partial SendGrid outage.
root_cause: Regional SMTP routing issue; temporary 5xx from provider.
user_impact: ~12% of password reset emails failed delivery within the first attempt.
followup_actions: Add provider status integration to alerts
